card_description: Justinian is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 3 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick explores the "Holy Spirit" (Elijah) as the precursor to the "Second Birth" of the Logos/Wisdom (Santa Sophia)."
